title: Pending card hold appears twice after mobile retry
body: The mobile client retried after a timeout without reusing its idempotency key. Two pending holds appear, but only one settled charge exists.

title: Node quickstart references removed client method
body: The Node quickstart calls client.legacyGenerate(), which no longer exists in the current SDK. The API itself works with the current method.

title: Webhook problem
body: A customer says webhooks are wrong. No endpoint, delivery ID, timestamp, response status, or reproduction steps were provided.

title: Release artifact contains plaintext signing credential
body: A public release artifact includes a valid signing credential. Distribution was stopped, but downloads occurred before removal.
